title: Hush House Squadpack
description: Modpack designed for the Hush House squad's specific tastes, now available to the public!
body:
# Another Near-Vanilla pack, for picky eaters.
Without any significant overhauls, featuring create, and lots of mods to customise your playstyle and provide lots to explore, this is our pack designed to be accomodating to players new to modded, while still providing enough depth to keep experienced players entertained while playing alongside them!

## Why?
This pack was created because other packs that followed a similar theme didn't have a particular handful of mods that we considered must haves; Create - for tech, Knight Quest + Epic Knights + Spartans - for gear, as well as better combat, carts, carry-on, and a handful of others. As a result of the pack being mainly for people new to modding it is relatively lightweight, simple, and has optimisation mods to save any spiders living in your PC.

## Now open to the public!
Though initially intended for a personal group of friends, this pack is available for everyone, just in case you have the same problem with other packs that we did!

Pack is in early stages, so incompatibilities or lacking integrations may still be present! 

## Noteworthy mods
- Essential mod, for a simplified multiplayer experience!
- Create + Several addons (Including big guns! I was very particular about this)
- Spartan Weaponry + Shields
- Better Combat
- [Let's Do!] Suite
- Farmer's Delight
- Knight Quest
- Epic Knights
- Alex's Mobs and Caves
- Yung's Suite
- Valkyrien Skies (Testing, will have to see if it behaves.)
- Tectonic, Terralith, lots of dungeons, structures, taverns, etc, for a beautiful world
- Distant Horizons, to make sure you can see it!
- Lots of QOL
Enjoy!
